title: Void Teleport
description: A simple plugin With Folia Support that teleports players out of the void before they die. Works in selected worlds Configurable destination world Lightweight and optimized
body:
### Features

✅ Folia compatible!

✅ Teleports players before void death

✅ Works only in selected worlds

✅ Configurable destination world

✅ Lightweight and optimized

### Installation

Download the plugin JAR

Place it in the plugins folder

Restart the server

Edit plugins/VoidTeleport/config.yml

## Commands
Command	Description	Permission
/voidtp reload	Reload the config	voidteleport.reload

## Configuration Example

```yaml
# Worlds where void teleport is ACTIVE
enabled-worlds:
  - world

# World to teleport players to
teleport-world: world

# Y level at which teleport happens
void-y-level: -64

# Teleport location settings
teleport:
  x: 100.500
  y: 100.0
  z: 100.500
  yaw: -180
  pitch: 0.0

# Send message on teleport
message:
  enabled: true
  text: "&cYou fell into the void! Teleporting you back..."

# Debug messages in console
debug: false
```

### Compatibility

Paper, Spigot, Purpur, Folia & More

Minecraft 1.16 → Latest

## 🤝 Support

For issues, suggestions, or contributions:
- Contact SOULESS STUDIOS
